details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. All other expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.

reports/board/ directory missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md, systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md). .cursor/automations/ exists with README + specs. reports/audit/ exists.

Deprecated top-level directories still present: moltbot/ (5 Python files), board/ (contains eod/out/ with old cron_diagnosis and eod_failure artifacts). These should have been removed per governance cleanup.

Clawdbot/Moltbot references found in active code/config (excluding reports/audit and docs documenting removal): moltbot/orchestrator.py, moltbot/promotion_discipline.py, moltbot/board.py, moltbot/sentinel.py, moltbot/memory_evolution.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py
